<!--
  Thank you for contributing to Vizorix!
  Please fill out the sections below to help speed up code reviews.
-->

## Description
Provide a summary of the changes and the motivation for this pull request. If there are visual changes, please include screenshots or GIFs.

## Related Issues
Fixes # (issue reference)
Closes # (issue reference)

## Type of Change
- [ ] `feat`: A new feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] `fix`: A bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] `docs`: Documentation only changes
- [ ] `style`: Code style changes (formatting, semi-colons, white spaces)
- [ ] `refactor`: Code changes that neither fix a bug nor add a feature
- [ ] `perf`: Performance optimizations
- [ ] `test`: Adding missing tests or correcting existing tests
- [ ] `chore` / `build`: Workspace configurations and package updates

## Module Impact
- [ ] `apps/web`
- [ ] `apps/api`
- [ ] `packages/execution-engine`
- [ ] `packages/shared`
- [ ] `packages/visualization`
- [ ] `packages/ai`
- [ ] `packages/ui`
- [ ] `infrastructure`

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code styles and naming guidelines of this project (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](file:///c:/Users/dell/OneDrive/Desktop/CODING/vizorix/CONTRIBUTING.md)).
- [ ] I have verified my changes compile cleanly.
- [ ] I have documented any environment variables changes in `.env.example`.
- [ ] I have updated related documentation files inside the `docs/` directory.
